You’re like honey on a summer day
(neon yeoreumnal kkul gata)

Every word you speak takes my breath away
(ne mal hammadie sumi meojeo)

The way you smile, it lights up my sky
(ne useumi nae harureul bakhigo)

You’re the reason I believe in why
(geuraeseo sarangeul mitge dwae)

Every moment with you feels like a dream
(neorang isseumyeon modeun sunggani kkum gata)

You’re my melody, my sweetest theme
(neon nae mellodiigo, gajang dalkomhan noraeya)

I don’t need the stars when I’ve got your light
(sesange byeori eopseodo neoman isseumyeon dwae)

Baby, stay with me tonight
(oneul bam nae gyeote isseo jwo)

You’re sweet like the morning sun
(neon achim haetsalcheoreom ttatteuthae)

The kind of love that makes me come undone
(neoman itdamyeon nae modeun ge muneojyeodo gwaenchana)

Every little thing you do, I fall for you
(ne modeun ge nal dasi sarange ppajige hae)

There’s nothing in this world as sweet as you
(sesange neomangkeum dalkomhan geon eopseo)

You’re the rhythm in my favorite song

The kind of magic I’ve been chasing all along
